The '''''Strident''-class Star Defender''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] in the later years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
Produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]], the ''Strident''-class saw action against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Three were stationed at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Battle of Fondor]].<ref name="AOCIIJE" />

In the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], a number of them were used by the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

The ships belonged to a different size class than that of the [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carriers]], being longer but thinner than their adversarial counterparts.<ref name="Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
